reviews.comment:
La atencion es buena pero no tenian sistema x lo cual no pude tener el dcto de socio... deberian resolverlo y acreditarlo vs cuota o reintegrarlo en efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good but they didn't have a system so I couldn't get the membership card... they should resolve it and credit it against the fee or refund it in cash.
